channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [UNIONBANK] Union Bank of India Approves ¥ 27,500 Crore Fund Raising for Infrastructure and Affordable Housing
item.description:
Union Bank of India's Committee of Directors for fund raising (Non-Capital) has approved the issuance of Long-Term Bonds amounting up to ¥ 20,000 crore and Green Bonds/Sustainable Bonds up to ¥ 5,000 crore. The bank is looking to raise ¥ 7,500 crore (Base Issue- ¥ 3,000 crore + Green shoe option- ¥ 4,500 crore) with a tenor of 10 years before 31.03.2026 for financing of infrastructure and affordable housing. The decision was made in a meeting held on 16th March, 2026.

  • Union Bank of India approved the issuance of Long-Term Bonds up to ¥ 20,000 crore for financing infrastructure and affordable housing.
  • The bank is planning to raise ¥ 7,500 crore before 31.03.2026 with a tenor of 10 years.
  • The bank also approved the issuance of Green Bonds/Sustainable Bonds up to ¥ 5,000 crore.
  • The decision was made in a Committee of Directors for fund raising (Non-Capital) meeting held on 16th March, 2026.
  • The funds will be raised as per the Board approved plan.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UNION BANK OF INDIA | Category: Investment

item.title: [GARGI] PNGS Gargi Fashion Jewellery Ltd Opens New Exclusive Brand Store in Pune
item.description:
PNGS Gargi Fashion Jewellery Ltd has announced the opening of its new exclusive brand store at Shop No. 3, Ground Floor of Punyayee Business Square, Survey No. 127/1A, City Survey No. 833/A, Plot No. 1, Paud Road, Kothrud, Pune- 411038 on March 15, 2026 at 11:30 AM.

  • PNGS Gargi Fashion Jewellery Ltd has opened a new exclusive brand store in Pune
  • The store is located at Shop No. 3, Ground Floor of Punyayee Business Square, Survey No. 127/1A, City Survey No. 833/A, Plot No. 1, Paud Road, Kothrud, Pune- 411038

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PNGS Gargi Fashion Jewellery Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [MCFL] Mayank Cattle Food Ltd Launches Innovative Products 'MAYANK ALL IN ONE' and 'MAYANK HAJMA HAJAM'
item.description:
Mayank Cattle Food Ltd, a leading provider of quality cattle feed, has announced the launch of two new products, 'MAYANK ALL IN ONE' and 'MAYANK HAJMA HAJAM'. 'MAYANK ALL IN ONE' is a complete nutritional feed supplement for dairy animals, designed to support higher milk production, improved fat content, and overall herd health. 'MAYANK HAJMA HAJAM' is a digestive health supplement that supports optimal rumen function, improves nutrient absorption, and enhances overall performance. These products are expected to boost revenue, diversify income sources, and enhance market penetration for the company.

  • Mayank Cattle Food Ltd launches two new products, 'MAYANK ALL IN ONE' and 'MAYANK HAJMA HAJAM'
  • 'MAYANK ALL IN ONE' is a complete nutritional feed supplement for dairy animals
  • 'MAYANK HAJMA HAJAM' is a digestive health supplement that supports optimal rumen function
  • These products are expected to boost revenue, diversify income sources, and enhance market penetration for the company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mayank Cattle Food Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [RAMCOSYS] Ramco Systems and Anna University Collaborate to Establish an Intelligent ERP Lab
item.description:
Global enterprise software company Ramco Systems has signed an MOU with Anna University to establish a dedicated ERP Lab for the University’s Industrial Engineering programme. The lab will give students hands-on exposure to Al-powered ERP platforms, intelligent workflows, and modern enterprise technologies. The collaboration will also enable academic engagements, applied research, and innovation initiatives, along with pathways for internships and placements.

  • Ramco Systems and Anna University sign MOU to establish an Intelligent ERP Lab for Industrial Engineering Students.
  • The lab will provide students hands-on exposure to AI-powered ERP platforms, intelligent workflows, and modern enterprise technologies.
  • The collaboration will enable academic engagements, applied research, and innovation initiatives.
  • The MOU includes structured avenues for internships and campus recruitment.
  • The lab will be integrated into undergraduate and postgraduate coursework, enabling students to apply classroom learning to real-world scenarios across manufacturing operations, supply chain, and finance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RAMCO SYSTEMS LTD. | Category: MoU

item.title: [GOODLUCK] Goodluck Defence & Aerospace Dispatches First Overseas Order of 155 mm Heavy Calibre Shells
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Goodluck Defence & Aerospace, a subsidiary of Goodluck India Ltd, has successfully commenced its first overseas dispatch of 155 mm heavy calibre empty shells from its manufacturing plant in Uttar Pradesh. This marks a significant advancement in the Company’s expansion into international markets, strengthening its position within the global defence supply chain. The journey included establishing a dedicated manufacturing facility, securing technical validations and manufacturer approvals, and obtaining the first export order. The Company continues to focus on operational excellence, regulatory compliance, and timely execution of orders to support its long-term growth strategy.

  • Goodluck Defence & Aerospace commences first overseas dispatch of 155 mm heavy calibre empty shells.
  • This dispatch marks a significant advancement in the Company’s expansion into international markets.
  • The Company secured the necessary technical validations and manufacturer approvals for participation in the global supply chain.
  • Goodluck Defence & Aerospace successfully procured its first export order and obtained all necessary internal and regulatory clearances for acceptance and execution.
  • The Company continues to focus on operational excellence, regulatory compliance, and timely execution of orders to support its long-term growth strategy.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Goodluck India Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [BAJAJELEC] Bajaj Electricals Grants 18,894 Stock Options Under PSOP Plan 2023 to Eligible Employee
item.description:
Bajaj Electricals Ltd. has granted 18,894 stock options under the 'Bajaj Electricals Limited- Performance Stock Option Plan 2023' (PSOP Plan 2023) to one eligible employee. The PSOP Plan 2023 is in compliance with the SEBI (Share Based Employee Benefits and Sweat Equity) Regulations, 2021. The exercise price of the options is equal to the face value of the equity share of the Company, i.e., Rs.2/- per equity share.

  • Bajaj Electricals Ltd. grants 18,894 stock options under PSOP Plan 2023
  • The PSOP Plan 2023 is in compliance with SEBI regulations
  • The exercise price of the options is equal to the face value of the equity share of the Company
  • The options are granted to one eligible employee
  • The move is a part of good corporate governance practices

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BAJAJ ELECTRICALS LTD.-$ | Category: Investment

item.title: [EXICOM] Exicom Inaugurates Integrated Manufacturing Facility in Hyderabad to Scale EV Charging and Critical Power Solutions
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Exicom Tele-Systems Limited, one of India’s leading EV charging and critical power companies, has inaugurated its new integrated manufacturing facility in Hyderabad. The facility, built with an investment of INR 216 cr, is designed around Industry 4.0 manufacturing principles and significantly expands Exicom’s manufacturing footprint. It will support the growing demand for EV charging infrastructure, lithium-ion battery systems, and critical power solutions across domestic and export markets. The plant features advanced automation, robotics, and digital traceability, and is certified to internationally recognized standards including IATF 16949, ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, and IS0 45001:2018. Sustainability has been embedded into the design and operations of the facility.

  • Exicom has inaugurated a new integrated manufacturing facility in Hyderabad, Telangana.
  • The facility is designed around Industry 4.0 manufacturing principles and features advanced automation, robotics, and digital traceability.
  • The plant significantly expands Exicom’s manufacturing footprint and increases overall production capacity by 2.5X.
  • The facility is certified to internationally recognized standards including IATF 16949, ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, and IS0 45001:2018.
  • Sustainability has been embedded into the design and operations of the facility.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Exicom Tele-Systems Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [EASEMYTRIP] EaseMyTrip Recognised Among India's Most Trusted Brands 2026-2027
item.description:
EaseMyTrip, one of India’s leading online travel-tech platforms, has been recognised among the brands featured in the ‘Most Trusted Brands of India 2026—2027’. The recognition was announced at the 6th Edition of the ‘Most Trusted Brands of India 2026—2027’ platform organised by Team Marksmen Network. The selection follows a structured and transparent evaluation process conducted by Coherent Market Insights. EaseMyTrip has built a strong reputation in the travel industry with its customer-first approach and zero-convenience fee model.

  • EaseMyTrip recognised among the ‘Most Trusted Brands of India 2026—2027’
  • Recognition based on a structured and transparent evaluation process by Coherent Market Insights
  • EaseMyTrip known for its customer-first approach and zero-convenience fee model
  • 6th Edition of the ‘Most Trusted Brands of India 2026—2027’ organised by Team Marksmen Network
  • EaseMyTrip is one of India’s largest online travel-tech platforms in terms of air ticket bookings

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Easy Trip Planners Ltd | Category: Award

item.title: [EXICOM] Exicom Tele-Systems Ltd Commences Commercial Production at Telangana Plant
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Exicom Tele-Systems Ltd has announced the commencement of commercial production operations at its manufacturing facility in Telangana. The Telangana Plant, which started its trial production in November 2025, has now successfully completed stabilization and began regular commercial production from March 16, 2026. The facility will focus on manufacturing and assembling EV battery charging stations, EV chargers, Li-ion battery packs, SMPS (DC power systems), and other products involving power electronics and IoT integration. This move aims to augment the company's manufacturing capacity and cater to the growing market demand.

  • Exicom Tele-Systems Ltd has started commercial production at its Telangana Plant.
  • The Telangana Plant began its trial production in November 2025 and has now completed stabilization.
  • The facility will manufacture and assemble EV battery charging stations, EV chargers, Li-ion battery packs, SMPS (DC power systems), and other products involving power electronics and IoT integration.
  • This move aims to augment Exicom's manufacturing capacity.
  • The new plant will cater to the growing market demand.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Exicom Tele-Systems Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [LLOYDSME] Lloyds Metals Commences Commercial Production of Copper Cathodes in DRC, Marks Entry into Global Copper Value Chain
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Lloyds Metals & Energy Limited (LMEL) through its subsidiary, has commenced commercial production of copper cathodes from its 12,000 tonnes p.a. copper processing plant located in the Katanga Copper Belt in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC). The milestone marks the Company’s strategic entry into the global copper value chain, positioning Lloyds Metals to participate in the rapidly expanding demand for copper driven by electrification, renewable energy infrastructure and electric mobility. The first copper cathodes have now been successfully produced at the facility, confirming operational readiness of the plant and marking the beginning of commercial operations. The company expects the facility to progressively ramp up production, with an estimated production outlook of ~10,000-12000 tonnes of copper cathodes in CY2026 and ~15,000 tonnes in CY2027. Over the medium term, the platform has a clear expansion pathway to scale capacity towards 30,000 tonnes per annum.

  • Lloyds Metals commences commercial production of copper cathodes from its 12,000 TPA plant in the DRC
  • Entry into the global copper value chain
  • Expected production outlook: ~10,000-12000 tonnes of copper cathodes in CY2026 and ~15,000 tonnes in CY2027
  • Medium term expansion pathway to scale capacity towards 30,000 tonnes per annum

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LLOYDS METALS AND ENERGY LTD. | Category: New Launch
